## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build, CI, or release maintenance

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --all-features`
- [ ] Manual macOS testing, if input handling, configuration, daemon startup, or launchd behavior changed

## Manual Testing Notes

Describe any manual testing performed, including macOS version, input device, and configuration used.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated cleanup.
- [ ] User-facing behavior or configuration changes are documented in `README.md`.
- [ ] New dependencies are justified in the pull request description.
- [ ] Generated build artifacts are not committed.
